name: Compare traditional SEO vs. AI visibility for Chicago firms.

mainEntity.name: Compare traditional SEO vs. AI visibility for Chicago firms.

acceptedAnswer.description: **AI visibility trumps SEO as platforms ignore sites, favoring directories; SEO useless for direct cites.** Traditional SEO boosts Google links; AI synthesizes authorities. **Key factors:** 1) Citation sources; 2) Consumer tiers; 3) Update frequency; 4) Cost efficiency. Pivot 70% to recognitions, 30% SEO. AI wins long-term.[3]
